## Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay Namespace

| :--- | :--- |
| [AggregateReconstructionRequest](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionRequest.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.AggregateReconstructionRequest') | Wire request asking a domain service to replay events for an aggregate via its canonical Apply path\. Sent by the EventStore server to the domain service's `POST /replay-state` endpoint\. |
| [AggregateReconstructionResult](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.AggregateReconstructionResult') | Wire result returned by a domain service replay endpoint\. The Admin replay path maps [Status](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.Status 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.AggregateReconstructionResult\.Status') and [ErrorCategory](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.ErrorCategory 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.AggregateReconstructionResult\.ErrorCategory') to RFC 7807 ProblemDetails per the Failure and HTTP Semantics Matrix in admin\-ui\-aggregate\-state\-replay\-correctness\. |
| [AggregateReconstructionTimelineEntry](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionTimelineEntry.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.AggregateReconstructionTimelineEntry') | Per\-event aggregate state snapshot captured during a replay request that opted into timeline mode\. Used by Admin surfaces \(Blame, Step Through\) that need state\-after\-each\-event without paying for one HTTP round trip per event\. |
| [ReplayEventEnvelope](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.ReplayEventEnvelope.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.ReplayEventEnvelope') | Wire shape of a single persisted event passed to a domain replay endpoint\. Carries the metadata fields required to drive Apply via the runtime convention plus the raw payload bytes\. Intentionally narrower than the storage envelope: only fields the Apply path or replay diagnostics consume\. |
